title: Legendary Armor applies Atk plus six AL plus six and hit dice plus one while equipped

plan.title: Legendary Armor applies Atk plus six AL plus six and hit dice plus one while equipped
plan.summary: Equip Legendary Armor to a modifier-zero primary creature, verify AL gains +6, and run a battle to verify the Atk bonus.

notes: Use test_primary_creature_mod_0 so the Atk bonus comes only from Legendary Armor.

steps: Player 1 plays Legendary Armor and equips it to their primary creature.
Run a follow-up battle with the equipped creature attacking.

expectedAssertions.label: Attack damage includes the +6 Atk bonus

manualVerification: Confirm the extra Hit Dice Roll is shown in battle UI.
riskNotes: This fixture verifies AL and Atk with stable paths; hit dice count still needs a first-class effective stat assertion path.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Validate Legendary Armor equipped stat suite.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
